name: Johnny Carson
title: Last known photo of Johnny Carson, taken on January 4, 2005, shortly before his death from emphysema.
description: Johnny Carson was photographed on January 4, 2005, during the final weeks of his famously private retirement. Carson had hosted "The Tonight Show" for 30 years before retiring in 1992, and rarely made public appearances afterward. He died on January 23, 2005, at Cedars-Sinai Medical Center in Los Angeles from respiratory failure caused by emphysema, the result of decades of heavy smoking. He was 79 years old. True to his private nature, he requested no public funeral or memorial service.
bio: Johnny Carson was an American television host who hosted "The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson" for 30 years. He is widely considered the king of late-night television.
